chapters.zh: 当犹大王约坦、亚哈斯、希西家在位的时候，摩利沙人弥迦得耶和华的默示，论撒玛利亚和耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: The word of the LORD that came to Micah the Morasthite in the days of Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah, kings of Judah, which he saw concerning Samaria and Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 万民哪，你们都要听！地和其上所有的，也都要侧耳而听！主耶和华从他的圣殿要见证你们的不是。
chapters.en: Hear, all ye people; hearken, O earth, and all that therein is: and let the Lord GOD be witness against you, the Lord from his holy temple.

chapters.zh: 看哪，耶和华出了他的居所，降临步行地的高处。
chapters.en: For, behold, the LORD cometh forth out of his place, and will come down, and tread upon the high places of the earth.

chapters.zh: 众山在他以下必消化，诸谷必崩裂，如蜡化在火中，如水冲下山坡。
chapters.en: And the mountains shall be molten under him, and the valleys shall be cleft, as wax before the fire, as the waters poured down a steep place.

chapters.zh: 这都因雅各的罪过，以色列家的罪恶。雅各的罪过在哪里呢？岂不是在撒玛利亚么？犹大的邱坛在哪里呢？岂不是在耶路撒冷么？
chapters.en: For the transgression of Jacob all this, and for the sins of the house of Israel. What the transgression of Jacob? not Samaria? and what the high places of Judah? not Jerusalem?

chapters.zh: 所以我必使撒玛利亚变为田野的乱堆，又作为种葡萄之处；也必将她的石头倒在谷中，露出根基来。
chapters.en: Therefore I will make Samaria as an heap of the field, as plantings of a vineyard: and I will pour down the stones thereof into the valley, and I will discover the foundations thereof.

chapters.zh: 她一切雕刻的偶像必被打碎；她所得的财物必被火烧；所有的偶像我必毁灭；因为是从妓女雇价所聚来的，后必归为妓女的雇价。
chapters.en: And all the graven images thereof shall be beaten to pieces, and all the hires thereof shall be burned with the fire, and all the idols thereof will I lay desolate: for she gathered of the hire of an harlot, and they shall return to the hire of an harlot.

chapters.zh: 先知说：因此我必大声哀号，赤脚露体而行；又要呼号如野狗，哀鸣如鸵鸟。
chapters.en: Therefore I will wail and howl, I will go stripped and naked: I will make a wailing like the dragons, and mourning as the owls.

chapters.zh: 因为撒玛利亚的伤痕无法医治，延及犹大和耶路撒冷我民的城门。
chapters.en: For her wound incurable; for it is come unto Judah; he is come unto the gate of my people, to Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 不要在迦特报告这事，总不要哭泣；我在伯亚弗拉滚于灰尘之中。
chapters.en: Declare ye not at Gath, weep ye not at all: in the house of Aphrah roll thyself in the dust.

chapters.zh: 沙斐的居民哪，你们要赤身蒙羞过去。撒南的居民不敢出来。伯以薛人的哀哭使你们无处可站。
chapters.en: Pass ye away, thou inhabitant of Saphir, having thy shame naked: the inhabitant of Zaanan came not forth in the mourning of Bethezel; he shall receive of you his standing.

chapters.zh: 玛律的居民心甚忧急，切望得好处，因为灾祸从耶和华那里临到耶路撒冷的城门。
chapters.en: For the inhabitant of Maroth waited carefully for good: but evil came down from the LORD unto the gate of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 拉吉的居民哪，要用快马套车；锡安民（原文是女子）的罪由你而起；以色列人的罪过在你那里显出。
chapters.en: O thou inhabitant of Lachish, bind the chariot to the swift beast: she the beginning of the sin to the daughter of Zion: for the transgressions of Israel were found in thee.

chapters.zh: 犹大啊，你要将礼物送给摩利设迦特。亚革悉的众族必用诡诈待以色列诸王。
chapters.en: Therefore shalt thou give presents to Moreshethgath: the houses of Achzib a lie to the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 玛利沙的居民哪，我必使那夺取你的来到你这里；以色列的尊贵人（原文是荣耀）必到亚杜兰。
chapters.en: Yet will I bring an heir unto thee, O inhabitant of Mareshah: he shall come unto Adullam the glory of Israel.

chapters.zh: 犹大啊，要为你所喜爱的儿女剪除你的头发，使头光秃，要大大地光秃，如同秃鹰，因为他们都被掳去离开你。
chapters.en: Make thee bald, and poll thee for thy delicate children; enlarge thy baldness as the eagle; for they are gone into captivity from thee.

chapters.zh: 祸哉，那些在床上图谋罪孽、造作奸恶的！天一发亮，因手有能力就行出来了。
chapters.en: Woe to them that devise iniquity, and work evil upon their beds! when the morning is light, they practise it, because it is in the power of their hand.

chapters.zh: 他们贪图田地就占据，贪图房屋便夺取；他们欺压人，霸占房屋和产业。
chapters.en: And they covet fields, and take by violence; and houses, and take away: so they oppress a man and his house, even a man and his heritage.

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华如此说：我筹划灾祸降与这族；这祸在你们的颈项上不能解脱；你们也不能昂首而行，因为这时势是恶的。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD; Behold, against this family do I devise an evil, from which ye shall not remove your necks; neither shall ye go haughtily: for this time evil.

chapters.zh: 到那日，必有人向你们提起悲惨的哀歌，讥刺说：我们全然败落了！耶和华将我们的分转归别人，何竟使这分离开我们？他将我们的田地分给悖逆的人。
chapters.en: In that day shall take up a parable against you, and lament with a doleful lamentation, say, We be utterly spoiled: he hath changed the portion of my people: how hath he removed from me! turning away he hath divided our fields.

chapters.zh: 所以在耶和华的会中，你必没有人拈阄拉准绳。
chapters.en: Therefore thou shalt have none that shall cast a cord by lot in the congregation of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 他们（或译：假先知）说：你们不可说预言；不可向这些人说预言，不住地羞辱我们。
chapters.en: Prophesy ye not, prophesy: they shall not prophesy to them, they shall not take shame.

chapters.zh: 雅各家啊，岂可说耶和华的心不忍耐么（或译：心肠狭窄么）？这些事是他所行的么？我 ─ 耶和华的言语岂不是与行动正直的人有益么？
chapters.en: O named the house of Jacob, is the spirit of the LORD straitened? these his doings? do not my words do good to him that walketh uprightly?

chapters.zh: 然而，近来我的民兴起如仇敌，从那些安然经过不愿打仗之人身上剥去外衣。
chapters.en: Even of late my people is risen up as an enemy: ye pull off the robe with the garment from them that pass by securely as men averse from war.

chapters.zh: 你们将我民中的妇人从安乐家中赶出，又将我的荣耀从她们的小孩子尽行夺去。
chapters.en: The women of my people have ye cast out from their pleasant houses; from their children have ye taken away my glory for ever.

chapters.zh: 你们起来去罢！这不是你们安息之所；因为污秽使人（或译：地）毁灭，而且大大毁灭。
chapters.en: Arise ye, and depart; for this not rest: because it is polluted, it shall destroy , even with a sore destruction.

chapters.zh: 若有人心存虚假，用谎言说：我要向你们预言得清酒和浓酒。那人就必作这民的先知。
chapters.en: If a man walking in the spirit and falsehood do lie, , I will prophesy unto thee of wine and of strong drink; he shall even be the prophet of this people.

chapters.zh: 雅各家啊，我必要聚集你们，必要招聚以色列剩下的人，安置在一处，如波斯拉的羊，又如草场上的羊群；因为人数众多就必大大喧哗。
chapters.en: I will surely assemble, O Jacob, all of thee; I will surely gather the remnant of Israel; I will put them together as the sheep of Bozrah, as the flock in the midst of their fold: they shall make great noise by reason of men.

chapters.zh: 开路的（或译：破城的）在他们前面上去；他们直闯过城门，从城门出去。他们的王在前面行；耶和华引导他们。
chapters.en: The breaker is come up before them: they have broken up, and have passed through the gate, and are gone out by it: and their king shall pass before them, and the LORD on the head of them.

chapters.zh: 我说：雅各的首领，以色列家的官长啊，你们要听！你们不当知道公平么？
chapters.en: And I said, Hear, I pray you, O heads of Jacob, and ye princes of the house of Israel; not for you to know judgment?

chapters.zh: 你们恶善好恶，从人身上剥皮，从人骨头上剔肉，
chapters.en: Who hate the good, and love the evil; who pluck off their skin from off them, and their flesh from off their bones;

chapters.zh: 吃我民的肉，剥他们的皮，打折他们的骨头，分成块子像要下锅，又像釜中的肉。
chapters.en: Who also eat the flesh of my people, and flay their skin from off them; and they break their bones, and chop them in pieces, as for the pot, and as flesh within the caldron.

chapters.zh: 到了遭灾的时候，这些人必哀求耶和华，他却不应允他们。那时他必照他们所行的恶事向他们掩面。
chapters.en: Then shall they cry unto the LORD, but he will not hear them: he will even hide his face from them at that time, as they have behaved themselves ill in their doings.

chapters.zh: 论到使我民走差路的先知 ─ 他们牙齿有所嚼的，他们就呼喊说：平安了！凡不供给他们吃的，他们就预备攻击他（预备攻击他：或译说必遭遇刀兵）─ 耶和华如此说：
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD concerning the prophets that make my people err, that bite with their teeth, and cry, Peace; and he that putteth not into their mouths, they even prepare war against him.

chapters.zh: 你们必遭遇黑夜，以致不见异象；又必遭遇幽暗，以致不能占卜。日头必向你们沉落，白昼变为黑暗。
chapters.en: Therefore night unto you, that ye shall not have a vision; and it shall be dark unto you, that ye shall not divine; and the sun shall go down over the prophets, and the day shall be dark over them.

chapters.zh: 先见必抱愧，占卜的必蒙羞，都必摀著嘴唇，因为神不应允他们。
chapters.en: Then shall the seers be ashamed, and the diviners confounded: yea, they shall all cover their lips; for no answer of God.

chapters.zh: 至于我，我藉耶和华的灵，满有力量、公平、才能，可以向雅各说明他的过犯，向以色列指出他的罪恶。
chapters.en: But truly I am full of power by the spirit of the LORD, and of judgment, and of might, to declare unto Jacob his transgression, and to Israel his sin.

chapters.zh: 雅各家的首领、以色列家的官长啊，当听我的话！你们厌恶公平，在一切事上屈枉正直；
chapters.en: Hear this, I pray you, ye heads of the house of Jacob, and princes of the house of Israel, that abhor judgment, and pervert all equity.

chapters.zh: 以人血建立锡安，以罪孽建造耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: They build up Zion with blood, and Jerusalem with iniquity.

chapters.zh: 首领为贿赂行审判；祭司为雇价施训诲；先知为银钱行占卜。他们却倚赖耶和华，说：耶和华不是在我们中间么？灾祸必不临到我们。
chapters.en: The heads thereof judge for reward, and the priests thereof teach for hire, and the prophets thereof divine for money: yet will they lean upon the LORD, and say, not the LORD among us? none evil can come upon us.

chapters.zh: 所以因你们的缘故，锡安必被耕种像一块田，耶路撒冷必变为乱堆；这殿的山必像丛林的高处。
chapters.en: Therefore shall Zion for your sake be plowed a field, and Jerusalem shall become heaps, and the mountain of the house as the high places of the forest.

chapters.zh: 末后的日子，耶和华殿的山必坚立，超乎诸山，高举过于万岭；万民都要流归这山。
chapters.en: But in the last days it shall come to pass, the mountain of the house of the LORD shall be established in the top of the mountains, and it shall be exalted above the hills; and people shall flow unto it.

chapters.zh: 必有许多国的民前往，说：来吧，我们登耶和华的山，奔雅各神的殿。主必将他的道教训我们；我们也要行他的路。因为训诲必出于锡安；耶和华的言语必出于耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: And many nations shall come, and say, Come, and let us go up to the mountain of the LORD, and to the house of the God of Jacob; and he will teach us of his ways, and we will walk in his paths: for the law shall go forth of Zion, and the word of the LORD from Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 他必在多国的民中施行审判，为远方强盛的国断定是非。他们要将刀打成犁头，把枪打成镰刀。这国不举刀攻击那国；他们也不再学习战事。
chapters.en: And he shall judge among many people, and rebuke strong nations afar off; and they shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruninghooks: nation shall not lift up a sword against nation, neither shall they learn war any more.

chapters.zh: 人人都要坐在自己葡萄树下和无花果树下，无人惊吓。这是万军之耶和华亲口说的。
chapters.en: But they shall sit every man under his vine and under his fig tree; and none shall make afraid: for the mouth of the LORD of hosts hath spoken .

chapters.zh: 万民各奉己神的名而行；我们却永永远远奉耶和华 ─ 我们神的名而行。
chapters.en: For all people will walk every one in the name of his god, and we will walk in the name of the LORD our God for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：到那日，我必聚集瘸腿的，招聚被赶出的和我所惩治的。
chapters.en: In that day, saith the LORD, will I assemble her that halteth, and I will gather her that is driven out, and her that I have afflicted;

chapters.zh: 我必使瘸腿的为余剩之民，使赶到远方的为强盛之民。耶和华要在锡安山作王治理他们，从今直到永远。
chapters.en: And I will make her that halted a remnant, and her that was cast far off a strong nation: and the LORD shall reign over them in mount Zion from henceforth, even for ever.

chapters.zh: 你这羊群的高台、锡安城（原文是女子）的山哪，，从前的权柄 ─ 就是耶路撒冷民（原文是女子）的国权 ─ 必归与你。
chapters.en: And thou, O tower of the flock, the strong hold of the daughter of Zion, unto thee shall it come, even the first dominion; the kingdom shall come to the daughter of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 现在你为何大声哭号呢？疼痛抓住你彷佛产难的妇人，是因你中间没有君王么？你的谋士灭亡了么？
chapters.en: Now why dost thou cry out aloud? no king in thee? is thy counsellor perished? for pangs have taken thee as a woman in travail.

chapters.zh: 锡安的民（原文是女子）哪，你要疼痛劬劳，彷佛产难的妇人；因为你必从城里出来，住在田野，到巴比伦去。在那里要蒙解救；在那里耶和华必救赎你脱离仇敌的手。
chapters.en: Be in pain, and labour to bring forth, O daughter of Zion, like a woman in travail: for now shalt thou go forth out of the city, and thou shalt dwell in the field, and thou shalt go to Babylon; there shalt thou be delivered; there the LORD shall redeem thee from the hand of thine enemies.

chapters.zh: 现在有许多国的民聚集攻击你，说：愿锡安被玷污！愿我们亲眼见他遭报！
chapters.en: Now also many nations are gathered against thee, that say, Let her be defiled, and let our eye look upon Zion.

chapters.zh: 他们却不知道耶和华的意念，也不明白他的筹划。他聚集他们，好像把禾捆聚到禾场一样。
chapters.en: But they know not the thoughts of the LORD, neither understand they his counsel: for he shall gather them as the sheaves into the floor.

chapters.zh: 锡安的民（原文作女子）哪，起来踹谷罢！我必使你的角成为铁，使你的蹄成为铜。你必打碎多国的民，将他们的财献与耶和华，将他们的货献与普天下的主。
chapters.en: Arise and thresh, O daughter of Zion: for I will make thine horn iron, and I will make thy hoofs brass: and thou shalt beat in pieces many people: and I will consecrate their gain unto the LORD, and their substance unto the Lord of the whole earth.

chapters.zh: 成群的民（原文是女子）哪，现在你要聚集成队；因为仇敌围攻我们，要用杖击打以色列审判者的脸。
chapters.en: Now gather thyself in troops, O daughter of troops: he hath laid siege against us: they shall smite the judge of Israel with a rod upon the cheek.

chapters.zh: 伯利恒、以法他啊，你在犹大诸城中为小，将来必有一位从你那里出来，在以色列中为我作掌权的；他的根源从亘古，从太初就有。
chapters.en: But thou, Bethlehem Ephratah, thou be little among the thousands of Judah, out of thee shall he come forth unto me to be ruler in Israel; whose goings forth from of old, from everlasting.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必将以色列人交付敌人，直等那生产的妇人生下子来。那时掌权者（原文是他）其余的弟兄必归到以色列人那里。
chapters.en: Therefore will he give them up, until the time she which travaileth hath brought forth: then the remnant of his brethren shall return unto the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 他必起来，倚靠耶和华的大能，并耶和华 ─ 他神之名的威严，牧养他的羊群。他们要安然居住；因为他必日见尊大，直到地极。
chapters.en: And he shall stand and feed in the strength of the LORD, in the majesty of the name of the LORD his God; and they shall abide: for now shall he be great unto the ends of the earth.

chapters.zh: 这位必作我们的平安。当亚述人进入我们的地境，践踏宫殿的时候，我们就立起七个牧者，八个首领攻击他。
chapters.en: And this shall be the peace, when the Assyrian shall come into our land: and when he shall tread in our palaces, then shall we raise against him seven shepherds, and eight principal men.

chapters.zh: 他们必用刀剑毁坏亚述地和宁录地的关口。亚述人进入我们的地境践踏的时候，他必拯救我们。
chapters.en: And they shall waste the land of Assyria with the sword, and the land of Nimrod in the entrances thereof: thus shall he deliver from the Assyrian, when he cometh into our land, and when he treadeth within our borders.

chapters.zh: 雅各余剩的人必在多国的民中，如从耶和华那里降下的露水，又如甘霖降在草上；不仗赖人力，也不等候世人之功。
chapters.en: And the remnant of Jacob shall be in the midst of many people as a dew from the LORD, as the showers upon the grass, that tarrieth not for man, nor waiteth for the sons of men.

chapters.zh: 雅各余剩的人必在多国多民中，如林间百兽中的狮子，又如少壮狮子在羊群中。他若经过就必践踏撕裂，无人搭救。
chapters.en: And the remnant of Jacob shall be among the Gentiles in the midst of many people as a lion among the beasts of the forest, as a young lion among the flocks of sheep: who, if he go through, both treadeth down, and teareth in pieces, and none can deliver.

chapters.zh: 愿你的手举起，高过敌人！愿你的仇敌都被剪除！
chapters.en: Thine hand shall be lifted up upon thine adversaries, and all thine enemies shall be cut off.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：到那日，我必从你中间剪除马匹，毁坏车辆，
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass in that day, saith the LORD, that I will cut off thy horses out of the midst of thee, and I will destroy thy chariots:

chapters.zh: 也必从你国中除灭城邑，拆毁一切的保障，
chapters.en: And I will cut off the cities of thy land, and throw down all thy strong holds:

chapters.zh: 又必除掉你手中的邪术；你那里也不再有占卜的。
chapters.en: And I will cut off witchcrafts out of thine hand; and thou shalt have no soothsayers:

chapters.zh: 我必从你中间除灭雕刻的偶像和柱像，你就不再跪拜自己手所造的。
chapters.en: Thy graven images also will I cut off, and thy standing images out of the midst of thee; and thou shalt no more worship the work of thine hands.

chapters.zh: 我必从你中间拔出木偶，又毁灭你的城邑。
chapters.en: And I will pluck up thy groves out of the midst of thee: so will I destroy thy cities.

chapters.zh: 我也必在怒气和忿怒中向那不听从的列国施报。
chapters.en: And I will execute vengeance in anger and fury upon the heathen, such as they have not heard.

chapters.zh: 以色列人哪，当听耶和华的话！要起来向山岭争辩，使冈陵听你的话。
chapters.en: Hear ye now what the LORD saith; Arise, contend thou before the mountains, and let the hills hear thy voice.

chapters.zh: 山岭和地永久的根基啊，要听耶和华争辩的话！因为耶和华要与他的百姓争辩，与以色列争论。
chapters.en: Hear ye, O mountains, the LORD'S controversy, and ye strong foundations of the earth: for the LORD hath a controversy with his people, and he will plead with Israel.

chapters.zh: 我的百姓啊，我向你做了甚么呢？我在甚么事上使你厌烦？你可以对我证明。
chapters.en: O my people, what have I done unto thee? and wherein have I wearied thee? testify against me.

chapters.zh: 我曾将你从埃及地领出来，从作奴仆之家救赎你；我也差遣摩西、亚伦，和米利暗在你前面行。
chapters.en: For I brought thee up out of the land of Egypt, and redeemed thee out of the house of servants; and I sent before thee Moses, Aaron, and Miriam.

chapters.zh: 我的百姓啊，你们当追念摩押王巴勒所设的谋和比珥的儿子巴兰回答他的话，并你们从什亭到吉甲所遇见的事，好使你们知道耶和华公义的作为。
chapters.en: O my people, remember now what Balak king of Moab consulted, and what Balaam the son of Beor answered him from Shittim unto Gilgal; that ye may know the righteousness of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我朝见耶和华，在至高神面前跪拜，当献上甚么呢？岂可献一岁的牛犊为燔祭么？
chapters.en: Wherewith shall I come before the LORD, bow myself before the high God? shall I come before him with burnt offerings, with calves of a year old?

chapters.zh: 耶和华岂喜悦千千的公羊，或是万万的油河么？我岂可为自己的罪过献我的长子么？为心中的罪恶献我身所生的么？
chapters.en: Will the LORD be pleased with thousands of rams, with ten thousands of rivers of oil? shall I give my firstborn my transgression, the fruit of my body the sin of my soul?

chapters.zh: 世人哪，耶和华已指示你何为善。他向你所要的是甚么呢？只要你行公义，好怜悯，存谦卑的心，与你的神同行。
chapters.en: He hath shewed thee, O man, what good; and what doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly, and to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God?

chapters.zh: 耶和华向这城呼叫，智慧人必敬畏他的名。你们当听是谁派定刑杖的惩罚。
chapters.en: The LORD'S voice crieth unto the city, and wisdom shall see thy name: hear ye the rod, and who hath appointed it.

chapters.zh: 恶人家中不仍有非义之财和可恶的小升斗么？
chapters.en: Are there yet the treasures of wickedness in the house of the wicked, and the scant measure abominable?

chapters.zh: 我若用不公道的天平和囊中诡诈的法码，岂可算为清洁呢？
chapters.en: Shall I count pure with the wicked balances, and with the bag of deceitful weights?

chapters.zh: 城里的富户满行强暴；其中的居民也说谎言，口中的舌头是诡诈的。
chapters.en: For the rich men thereof are full of violence, and the inhabitants thereof have spoken lies, and their tongue deceitful in their mouth.

chapters.zh: 因此，我击打你，使你的伤痕甚重，使你因你的罪恶荒凉。
chapters.en: Therefore also will I make sick in smiting thee, in making desolate because of thy sins.

chapters.zh: 你要吃，却吃不饱；你的虚弱必显在你中间。你必挪去，却不得救护；所救护的，我必交给刀剑。
chapters.en: Thou shalt eat, but not be satisfied; and thy casting down in the midst of thee; and thou shalt take hold, but shalt not deliver; and which thou deliverest will I give up to the sword.

chapters.zh: 你必撒种，却不得收割；踹橄榄，却不得油抹身；踹葡萄，却不得酒喝。
chapters.en: Thou shalt sow, but thou shalt not reap; thou shalt tread the olives, but thou shalt not anoint thee with oil; and sweet wine, but shalt not drink wine.

chapters.zh: 因为你守暗利的恶规，行亚哈家一切所行的，顺从他们的计谋；因此，我必使你荒凉，使你的居民令人嗤笑，你们也必担当我民的羞辱。
chapters.en: For the statutes of Omri are kept, and all the works of the house of Ahab, and ye walk in their counsels; that I should make thee a desolation, and the inhabitants thereof an hissing: therefore ye shall bear the reproach of my people.

chapters.zh: 哀哉！我（或译：以色列）好像夏天的果子已被收尽，又像摘了葡萄所剩下的，没有一挂可吃的；我心羡慕初熟的无花果。
chapters.en: Woe is me! for I am as when they have gathered the summer fruits, as the grapegleanings of the vintage: no cluster to eat: my soul desired the firstripe fruit.

chapters.zh: 地上虔诚人灭尽；世间没有正直人；各人埋伏，要杀人流血，都用网罗猎取弟兄。
chapters.en: The good is perished out of the earth: and none upright among men: they all lie in wait for blood; they hunt every man his brother with a net.

chapters.zh: 他们双手作恶；君王徇情面，审判官要贿赂；位分大的吐出恶意，都彼此结联行恶。
chapters.en: That they may do evil with both hands earnestly, the prince asketh, and the judge for a reward; and the great , he uttereth his mischievous desire: so they wrap it up.

chapters.zh: 他们最好的，不过是蒺藜；最正直的，不过是荆棘篱笆。你守望者说，降罚的日子已经来到。他们必扰乱不安。
chapters.en: The best of them as a brier: the most upright than a thorn hedge: the day of thy watchmen thy visitation cometh; now shall be their perplexity.

chapters.zh: 不要倚赖邻舍；不要信靠密友。要守住你的口；不要向你怀中的妻提说。
chapters.en: Trust ye not in a friend, put ye not confidence in a guide: keep the doors of thy mouth from her that lieth in thy bosom.

chapters.zh: 因为，儿子藐视父亲；女儿抗拒母亲；媳妇抗拒婆婆；人的仇敌就是自己家里的人。
chapters.en: For the son dishonoureth the father, the daughter riseth up against her mother, the daughter in law against her mother in law; a man's enemies the men of his own house.

chapters.zh: 至于我，我要仰望耶和华，要等候那救我的神；我的神必应允我。
chapters.en: Therefore I will look unto the LORD; I will wait for the God of my salvation: my God will hear me.

chapters.zh: 我的仇敌啊，不要向我夸耀。我虽跌倒，却要起来；我虽坐在黑暗里，耶和华却作我的光。
chapters.en: Rejoice not against me, O mine enemy: when I fall, I shall arise; when I sit in darkness, the LORD a light unto me.

chapters.zh: 我要忍受耶和华的恼怒；因我得罪了他，直等他为我辨屈，为我伸冤。他必领我到光明中；我必得见他的公义。
chapters.en: I will bear the indignation of the LORD, because I have sinned against him, until he plead my cause, and execute judgment for me: he will bring me forth to the light, I shall behold his righteousness.

chapters.zh: 那时我的仇敌，就是曾对我说耶和华 ─ 你神在哪里的，他一看见这事就被羞愧遮盖。我必亲眼见他遭报；他必被践踏，如同街上的泥土。
chapters.en: Then mine enemy shall see , and shame shall cover her which said unto me, Where is the LORD thy God? mine eyes shall behold her: now shall she be trodden down as the mire of the streets.

chapters.zh: 以色列啊，日子必到，你的墙垣必重修；到那日，你的境界必开展（或译：命令必传到远方）。
chapters.en: the day that thy walls are to be built, that day shall the decree be far removed.

chapters.zh: 当那日，人必从亚述，从埃及的城邑，从埃及到大河，从这海到那海，从这山到那山，都归到你这里。
chapters.en: that day he shall come even to thee from Assyria, and the fortified cities, and from the fortress even to the river, and from sea to sea, and mountain to mountain. the fortified cities: or, even to the fortified cities}

chapters.zh: 然而，这地因居民的缘故，又因他们行事的结果，必然荒凉。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding the land shall be desolate because of them that dwell therein, for the fruit of their doings.

chapters.zh: 求耶和华在迦密山的树林中，用你的杖牧放你独居的民，就是你产业的羊群。求你容他们在巴珊和基列得食物，像古时一样。
chapters.en: Feed thy people with thy rod, the flock of thine heritage, which dwell solitarily the wood, in the midst of Carmel: let them feed Bashan and Gilead, as in the days of old.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我要把奇事显给他们看，好像出埃及地的时候一样。
chapters.en: According to the days of thy coming out of the land of Egypt will I shew unto him marvellous .

chapters.zh: 列国看见这事，就必为自己的势力惭愧；他们必用手摀口，掩耳不听。
chapters.en: The nations shall see and be confounded at all their might: they shall lay hand upon mouth, their ears shall be deaf.

chapters.zh: 他们必舔土如蛇，又如土中腹行的物，战战兢兢地出他们的营寨。他们必战惧投降耶和华，也必因我们的神而惧怕。
chapters.en: They shall lick the dust like a serpent, they shall move out of their holes like worms of the earth: they shall be afraid of the LORD our God, and shall fear because of thee.

chapters.zh: 神啊，有何神像你，赦免罪孽，饶恕你产业之余民的罪过，不永远怀怒，喜爱施恩？
chapters.en: Who a God like unto thee, that pardoneth iniquity, and passeth by the transgression of the remnant of his heritage? he retaineth not his anger for ever, because he delighteth mercy.

chapters.zh: 必再怜悯我们，将我们的罪孽踏在脚下，又将我们的一切罪投于深海。
chapters.en: He will turn again, he will have compassion upon us; he will subdue our iniquities; and thou wilt cast all their sins into the depths of the sea.

chapters.zh: 你必按古时起誓应许我们列祖的话，向雅各发诚实，向亚伯拉罕施慈爱。
chapters.en: Thou wilt perform the truth to Jacob, the mercy to Abraham, which thou hast sworn unto our fathers from the days of old.
